[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100110 3
1 01110111 6
2 00110101 4
3 10010101 4
4 10001101 4
5 11010111 6
6 01101001 4
7 10010011 4
